name: GoFaxYourself audio assets
note: WAV files are gitignored (*.wav) and generated/provided locally — with ONE exception: the project-owned default payload audio/it/anti-call-center.wav is whitelisted in .gitignore and shipped, so a clean clone has a working default. All other WAVs are local-only. The MIT LICENSE covers code and text scripts, NOT audio. See docs/AUDIO_GENERATION.md.

assets.redistribution_status: project-owned (shipped as the bundled default payload)
assets.notes: Original Italian demo WAV created by the project owner. Whitelisted in .gitignore (!audio/it/anti-call-center.wav) as the ONLY committed WAV, so a clean clone has a working default. Already mono / 8000 Hz / 16-bit PCM.

local_generation.redistribution_status: no (personal use only — Apple system voices are not redistributable)
local_generation.notes: Convenience way to generate local persona packs from the committed text scripts. These WAVs are local-only and gitignored (NOT the whitelisted default). For redistributable audio, use espeak via tools/generate-audio.sh and verify its license.
